archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Apple/Notion Minimalism

scale.label: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-semibold text-[var(--cm-text-2)]

rules: NO GREEN UI. Use Ochre (#8B3F1F) for all positive/highlight indicators.
Use Ochre ONLY for accents (buttons, key highlights, match score fill).
Use grayscale/neutral colors for standard UI elements.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Avoid nested containers and excessive borders. Use whitespace (padding/margin) and subtle dividers (1px border-b) to separate sections. Emulate a clean Notion document.

buttons.primary: Border-only (outline) style using the Ochre accent. Classes: border-2 border-[#8B3F1F] text-[#8B3F1F] hover:bg-[#8B3F1F] hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors font-medium
buttons.secondary: Ghost or subtle style. Classes: bg-transparent hover:bg-[var(--cm-surface-2)] text-[var(--cm-text)] px-6 py-2.5 rounded-full transition-colors font-medium

cards.style: Cardless design or ultra-minimal. Remove heavy shadows and thick borders. If a background is needed, use a very subtle fill (var(--cm-surface-2)) with no border.

dividers.style: Use subtle horizontal rules between major sections instead of boxing them. Classes: h-px w-full bg-[var(--cm-border)] opacity-50 my-12

Hero.layout: Flex column on mobile, Flex row (justify-between items-start) on desktop. Left side: Text content. Right side: MatchScore Ring.
Hero.metadata: Division and Conference should be inline, separated by a bullet (•), using text_secondary.
Hero.ai_summary: 1-2 lines explaining fit. Use text-xl text-[var(--cm-text-2)] leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mt-4.
Hero.ctas: Flex row, gap-4, mt-8. Primary: Add to Pipeline (Ochre outline). Secondary: Visit Website.
Hero.match_score: Right-aligned. Keep it clean. The ring fill should use the Ochre accent instead of green/multicolor.

Why_This_School.layout: Notion-style callout block. Background: accent_subtle (Ochre at 5% opacity). Padding: p-8 md:p-10. Radius: rounded-3xl. Margin: mt-12 mb-16.
Why_This_School.content: A simple list of 4 bullet points (Academic Fit, Division Fit, Location Preference, Roster Opportunity).
Why_This_School.typography: Bullet text should be large and legible (text-lg md:text-xl text-[var(--cm-text)]). Use a simple, elegant Ochre icon (like a check or spark) for bullets.

Quick_Snapshot.layout: CSS Grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8). No borders between items.
Quick_Snapshot.content: Merge Key Stats, School Profile, Admissions, Financial.
Quick_Snapshot.item_style: Flex column, gap-1. Top: Label (text-xs uppercase text-[var(--cm-text-2)] tracking-wider). Bottom: Value (text-2xl font-medium text-[var(--cm-text)]).

Opportunity_and_Risk.layout: Horizontal layout or 3-column bento without borders.
Opportunity_and_Risk.indicators: Replace red/green signals with textual clarity or Ochre/Gray dots. (e.g., 'Good Opportunity' -> Ochre dot; 'Moderate/Low' -> Gray dot).
Opportunity_and_Risk.content: Focus on roster competition and engagement signals in simple readable text.

Coaching_Staff.layout: Notion database list style. A vertical stack of rows.
Coaching_Staff.row_style: Flex row, items-center, justify-between, py-4, border-b border-[var(--cm-border)] last:border-0.
Coaching_Staff.content: Left: Avatar/Initials (soft background) + Name & Role (Flex col). Right: Email link (text-sm text-[var(--cm-text-2)] hover:text-[var(--cm-text)] transition-colors).

Program_Overview.typography: max-w-3xl, body scale. Read like a clean Notion page.

hero_background.description: Minimalist grey and white concrete architecture. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background or hero image if needed, though strictly optional for this Apple-style layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: REWRITE the School Details page to implement this Apple/Notion style redesign in React (.js files).
Do not change the underlying functionality, APIs, or data models. Only update the structure, hierarchy, and Tailwind classes.
Apply the Warm Ochre (#8B3F1F) to the Match Ring SVG and buttons as specified.
Completely remove the old StatCard component style and replace it with borderless typography-led grid items.
Build the 'Why This School' section as a premium, tinted callout block (bg-[#8B3F1F]/[0.05]).
Merge the Key Stats, School Profile, Admissions, and Financial sections into a single 'Quick Snapshot' grid.
Convert the Coaching Staff layout from cards to a clean, border-bottom list view.
Implement `data-testid` attributes on all buttons, interactive elements, and key data points.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind classes for layout. Remove all explicit Shadcn Card wrappers to achieve the borderless Apple look.
No Green UI. Strip out any text-green-500 or bg-green-100 classes.
